text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hey, listen. You're not busy, are you?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Tomorrow, lunchtime, I want you at 
the cafeteria! Pumpkin pie's on the 
menu, and we're gonna get some.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Get ready to wait in a looong line, and make 
sure you have a clean plate and fork with you!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Once you get me a slice… 
Well, I wouldn't mind letting you eat half.
